comment.body: You need to entertain Mike's earlier point of Trump becoming a lame duck. That might shift power back to Wall Street and could render a lot of his agenda harder to obtain. You can expect him to double down on the internal politics to make good some ground (more deportations, DOGE, etc - all the performance politics). But if he also loses his support among the voters things could get really interesting. He probably won't go silently. So if there ever would have been an internal coup of the military/CIA etc, I would expect this to happen soon (no prediction here).

comment.body: Well, if Citadel, BlackRock, JPM, Goldman, and the other ‘highly respected’ leaders get together to resolve this situation, they could have their quant teams switch their algorithms to mean reversion trading after buying in at a smaller size at Tuesday’s 5528 level, thereby providing the market with some liquidity. This wouldn’t create upside momentum, but it would compress the intraday range, filling the market with liquidity, which naturally suppresses volatility.
